case_title: VILLASENOR, RUBEN C. vs. CAMBY,ROBERT IND/DBA TECHNICAL COATING SPECIALISTS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF VILLASENOR, RUBEN C. AS TO DEFENDANT CAMBY,ROBERT IND/DBA TECHNICAL COATING SPECIALISTS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VILLASENOR, RUBEN C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMBY,ROBERT IND/DBA TECHNICAL COATING SPECIALISTS $1,243.00 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,326.00
